specialty_benchmark.source: CMS Medicare Provider Utilization and Payment Data: Physician and Other Practitioners

payer_rates.source: Transparency in Coverage Machine-Readable Files (No Surprises Act)

glp1_trends.source: CMS Part D Spending by Drug + Medicare Part D Prescribers
glp1_trends.notes: GLP-1 market is rapidly evolving. Watch for: generic semaglutide entries, new indications (MASH/NASH), CMS coverage decisions

ed_utilization.source: CMS Medicare Provider Utilization (Emergency Medicine subset)
ed_utilization.notes: ED trends data spans 2018-2023. Shows COVID dip and partial recovery.

provider_density.source: CMS Medicare Provider Utilization (aggregated by state and specialty)

medicare_advantage.why: MA enrollment now >50% of Medicare. Rate negotiations differ significantly from FFS.
medicare_advantage.source: CMS MA enrollment and plan data

telehealth_utilization.why: Post-PHE telehealth flexibilities being made permanent. Huge impact on provider density and access.
telehealth_utilization.source: CMS telehealth utilization data, ASPE reports

ai_clinical_adoption.why: HIMSS 2026 shows Epic/Oracle/Amazon deploying clinical AI agents. CPT codes for AI-assisted services emerging.
ai_clinical_adoption.source: AMA CPT code updates, CMS utilization for AI-related codes

prior_auth_reform.why: CMS Prior Authorization Interoperability Rule taking effect. Impacts payer-provider dynamics.

site_of_service_shift.why: Significant cost differential between hospital outpatient, ASC, and office settings. Movement to lower-cost sites accelerating.
